User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

lastActive.description: The last time the user was active.

isMaintenanceMode.description: Whether the app is in maintenance mode.

maintenanceMessage.description: The message to display during maintenance.

allowedEmails.description: List of emails allowed to bypass maintenance.
